commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a root-preserving `dist/` fallback for external channel secret contract lookup, regression tests for dist discovery and root precedence, and a changelog entry for #77241.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and v2026.5.3 only probe the plugin root for contract files, while the docs and Discord package surface use packaged `dist` output and Discord SecretRefs are documented. I did not run local reproduction because this review is read-only, but the PR head has green CI for the added regression coverage.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed because this PR already contains the focused code, test, and changelog changes with green exact-head CI; the remaining action is maintainer choice and landing coordination with #77246.
